subject: [CPS] OOM update for CPS Core from 3.0.1 to 3.1.0
commit_message:
[CPS] OOM update for CPS Core from 3.0.1 to 3.1.0

- updated properties in application yaml related to adding NCMP tag.
- update container image from 3.0.1 to 3.1.0

Issue-ID: CPS-1280
Change-Id: I317de26232c251c769fec8f44c1cc54cd0e6c9dd
Signed-off-by: mpriyank <priyank.maheshwari@est.tech>
